Meta.title: [One]Log — Africa's AI Infrastructure
Meta.description: [One]Log builds versatile, AI-powered infrastructure across 5 key sectors: finance & trading, health, agriculture, transport & logistics, and financial transactions. Solving real problems, improving lives in Africa.

Hero.subtitle: [One]Log is the versatile infrastructure putting AI to work in the real world: trade, get care, farm, move and pay — one ecosystem, five sectors, millions of lives improved.

Pillars.title: AI that solves real problems
Pillars.subtitle: Every [One]Log pillar tackles an essential everyday need in Africa — with the same standard: performance in service of people.

finance.name: Finance & Trading
finance.description: AI-powered market analysis, signals and guidance to democratize disciplined, profitable trading.

health.name: Health
health.description: Decision support, access to care and smart monitoring to bring quality health closer to every community.

agriculture.name: Agriculture
agriculture.description: Forecasting, yield optimization and agronomic guidance for safer, more sustainable harvests.

logistics.name: Transport & Logistics
logistics.description: Optimized routes, real-time tracking and seamless supply chains at continental scale.

payments.name: Financial Transactions
payments.description: Fast, secure and inclusive payments — a trust layer for Africa's digital economy.

Vision.title: Ambitious. United. Relentless.
Vision.body: We don't just build products: we solve problems that matter and improve lives. "Stay Hungry" is our culture — hungry for impact, loyal to Africa, uncompromising on execution.

hungry.title: Hungry for impact
hungry.description: Every line of code must improve a real life.

together.title: Stronger together
together.description: Solidarity and local talent at the heart of everything we build.

one.quote: With [One]Log I learned to trade with method. The AI signals gave me discipline and confidence.
one.author: Independent trader

two.quote: Smart monitoring helped us route patients to the right care faster.
two.author: Healthcare professional

three.quote: Reliable forecasts secured our harvest and raised our income.
three.author: Farming cooperative

Cta.title: Ready to power your sector with AI?
Cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your project, your market, and how [One]Log can accelerate real impact.

Footer.tagline: The versatile AI infrastructure improving daily life in Africa.
